yesterdayAnalysis: Completed 1.2mi open water swim at La Jolla Shores (39 TSS) as scheduled for Friday. This was the planned easy swim paired with the Friday easy run. Good execution of the taper week's reduced volume approach — open water practice valuable 29 days out from Oregon 70.3.
todayRecommendation: Execute today's long ride 50-55mi keeping NP strictly under 150w, followed by the 20-min easy brick run. Already at 117% of weekly TSS target (374/320), so discipline on power today is critical — this is a taper week, not a stress week. Treat the ride as race rehearsal pacing, not fitness building.
weekProgress: Week 9 of 10 is complete at 374 TSS of 320 target (117%). All key sessions executed: Monday and Wednesday bricks done, Thursday quality swim completed (2500m with 4x100 race pace), Friday easy run and OWS completed. Saturday long ride and brick completed yesterday (55.7mi, 114 TSS). Volume reduction achieved as planned for transition week.
keyInsight: Already 17% over weekly TSS target with all major sessions complete — today should be true easy recovery only to honor the taper design and avoid accumulated fatigue 4 weeks from A-race.
